shared_properties: Project core palette keeps primary #3BBEAC, background #1E1E2E, and accent #FFD700.
Canvas target stays 1920x1080px with pixel-perfect nearest-neighbor presentation at 60 FPS.
Rendering stays 2D pixel art with flat shading and a 1px dark moss outline.
The rounded silhouette and face placement remain aligned with the tier-1 slime family.
differences: The body expands to 48x48px and communicates weight value 2.
Six frames add a blink and a deeper squash cycle.
The lower rim thickens by 1px for a denser read.

context.usage: Mid-tier merge result that anchors the evolution chain.

specs.texture: Dense inner bubble swirl and a brighter top highlight.
specs.shading: Flat fill with stronger lower shadow.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet size is exactly 288x48px with 6 columns and 1 row.
The lower rim thickness remains consistent within 1px across all frames.
Blink frames keep both eyes visible long enough for quick recognition.

reference_images.label: bubble_farm_slime_units
reference_images.purpose: Grounds slime silhouettes, evolution scale, and facial placement.

reference_images.label: bubble_farm_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the pastel mud farm palette and warm pixel-art tone.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteSheetBundle using the shared slime animation system.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load character/character_bubble_normal_idle_6f_8fps.png during the Loading state and store it beside the mini unit atlas.
runtime_notes: Keep the board anchor at the texture midpoint.
Allow the blink frame to last one fixed update longer than the bounce frames.
Preserve a 3px transparent gutter around the widest frame.
